title: astragalus platyfoliolatus
intro: Astragalus platyfoliolatus, also known as Astragalus, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. This perennial plant is native to China and has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus platyfoliolatus include improving immune function, reducing stress and fatigue, and potentially lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Astragalus is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and can also be consumed as an extract or added to soups and other dishes for its medicinal properties.
